title: Agent Hardening & Onboarding Refresh
description: Cross-user isolation tests, copilot audit log, landing/onboarding for new agent features.

userStories.title: Cross-user isolation tests
userStories.description: Tests: mission snooze user A vs B, mock interview quota per user, email_events isolation, agent activity scoped.

userStories.title: Copilot request audit logging
userStories.description: Log copilot chat requests via structlog: user_id, message length, history length. No full PII in logs.

userStories.title: Landing page agent-native refresh
userStories.description: Hero copy for co-pilot + /today. Feature grid: Apply Pack, Mock Interview, Watchlist. CTA to /today when logged in.

userStories.title: Onboarding checklist agent steps v2
userStories.description: Add Connect Agent profile, Try co-pilot, Visit Today steps after existing AI steps.
